sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) that which is good. לְטֹובָה for good, Neh 5:19, “remember me, O my God, לְטֹובָה for good,” i.e. that thou also wilt do good to me. Neh 13:31. Similarly used elsewhere for accurately defining medial expressions. Psa 86:17 Jer 14:11 24:6 Ezr 8:22.

(2) the goodness, kindness of God, Psa 65:12.

(3) goods, wealth, Ecc 5:10.

(4) welfare, happiness, Psa 16:2 106:5 .
